name: software-design-philosophy
description: A Codex skill for designing, reviewing, and refactoring software to reduce system-wide complexity.

interface.shortDescription: Reduce complexity with deep modules and information hiding
interface.longDescription: Review, compare, and implement software designs using change locality, low cognitive load, deep modules, information hiding, deliberate error semantics, and design-twice analysis.
defaultPrompt: Review this module for complexity and propose two better designs.
Refactor this feature using deep modules and information hiding.
Compare two API designs and recommend the one with lower long-term change cost.
